head.hi: Memorandum by Mr. Landreth M. Harrison of the Division of Eastern European Affairs

div.p: The original and three copies of the attached United States replyNot printed. to Finnish counter-proposals for the general provisionsNot found in Department files. to be included in the proposed American-Finnish trade agreement were delivered to the Finnish MinisterEero Järnefelt. today, together with the original and three copies of the attached comments thereon.Not printed. This reply will be studied in the Finnish Legation over the week-end and the Minister or Dr. von NumersSecretary of the Finnish Legation in Washington. will call at the Department in the event that any further information with respect thereto is desired before the full text is referred to the Finnish Foreign Office.
